message:
test(calibrate): add credible bounds verification for calibration reports

Adds a test that verifies CalibrationReport correctly computes Bayesian
credible bounds when trial data is present. The test constructs a dataset
with 2 predictions above threshold 0.5 (one correct, one miscalibrated),
then asserts:

- credible_bounds is Some when trials exist
- trial count and error count are accurate
- observed error rate matches expected (0.5 for 1/2)
- trial_definition string includes the threshold value

This covers a gap where credible bounds computation was untested and
ensures the Bayesian confidence interval metadata propagates correctly
through the report pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
